name: Omegaverse! Batfamily
description:
Free to use Omegaverse! Batfamily bot. I wasn't particularly satisfied with the omegaverse bots available on the site, so I made my own.
Characters in bot:

Alfred Pennyworth - beta
Bruce Wayne - alpha
Dick Grayson - omega
Barbara Gordon - alpha

Jason Todd - alpha
Tim Drake - beta
Damian Wayne - alpha

I plan to edit and update the bot, so don't worry, your favorite characters will appear sooner or later. I will edit the description as more characters are added.

In this bot, I tried to focus on the specifics of omegaverse as a genre and added a lot of my own headcanons. I hope you enjoy it! (I really recommend to use proxy)

22.02.26 update - Alfred and Jason added. Added a smell for every character.
05.03.26 update - TIMBO UPDATE. Planning to make the girls next. Minor other chars update.
27.04.26 update - That's been a while so FINALLY BARBARA. I also added a gender list cuz people asked to do this (I already thought about it, but I'm very lazy, srry :(). Updated betas and pups descriptions a bit, adding a couple of new features, hope you enjoy it!
creator: Diseasters
